mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.sid AS "sid.id", a.day AS "day", a.money AS "money", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
b.max AS "sid.max"
LEFT JOIN t_sign_set b ON b.id = a.sid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_sign_set_item( id, sid, day, money, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sid.id}, #{day}, #{money}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
